compiled_state.title: RED test: gate-2d-dependency-check.sh behavioral tests
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
Create tests/scripts/test-gate-2d-dependency-check.sh with behavioral bash tests. Each test creates temp project directories with controlled dependency files.

Tests:
1. test_detects_new_dependency — package not in pyproject.toml -> triggered:true
2. test_existing_dependency_no_trigger — package already listed -> triggered:false
3. test_detects_new_import — import not used anywhere in codebase -> triggered:true
4. test_existing_import_no_trigger — import used in sibling file -> triggered:false (must create sibling with same import)
5. test_emits_gate_signal_json — gate_id "2d", signal_type "primary"
6. test_no_manifest_graceful — no pyproject.toml or package.json -> fallback to import-only analysis
7. test_pyproject_only — only pyproject.toml exists (Python project) -> checks Python deps only
8. test_package_json_only — only package.json exists (Node project) -> checks Node deps only

Script interface: file paths (positional args), --repo-root (default git rev-parse).

Note: Gate 2d scope narrowed per user clarification to dependency detection in package manifests. "Novel architectural pattern" from done definition is out of scope — dependency-focused detection only.

.test-index entry: plugins/dso/scripts/gate-2d-dependency-check.sh: tests/scripts/test-gate-2d-dependency-check.sh

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test file exists
  Verify: test -f tests/scripts/test-gate-2d-dependency-check.sh
- [ ] At least 8 test functions
  Verify: grep -c 'test_' tests/scripts/test-gate-2d-dependency-check.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 8)}'
- [ ] .test-index entry exists
  Verify: grep -q 'gate-2d-dependency-check' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
